title: Cache key space-separator collision risk
reason: false positive: separator is an explicit NUL (\u0000), not a space; NUL cannot appear in tenant/subject ids so collision is impossible. Finder misread the NUL byte as a space.

title: Dual keyPrefix/keyPrefixes field expressiveness
reason: false positive: subjective doc nit; JSDoc already states the union semantics and the implementation is correct. Not a defect.

title: Retry test does not assert convergence call scans
reason: false positive: the claimed uncaught regression (unconditional allClean / skipped rebuild) is already caught by the existing two retry assertions that expect a re-scan at the same watermark.

title: Legacy test does not assert keyPrefixes passed
reason: false positive: the prefix-narrowing contract is already asserted by the dedicated 'narrows the scan by integration via keyPrefixes' test; redundant here.
